mapper.sql: id, title, content, cover_file_id, attachment_json, activity_start_time, activity_end_time, signup_start_time, signup_end_time, location, max_participants, status, publisher_org_id, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version

a.id, a.title, a.content, a.cover_file_id, a.attachment_json, a.activity_start_time, a.activity_end_time, a.signup_start_time, a.signup_end_time, a.location, a.max_participants, a.status, a.publisher_org_id, a.publish_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.deleted, a.version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM biz_activity WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_activity ( title, content, cover_file_id, attachment_json, activity_start_time, activity_end_time, signup_start_time, signup_end_time, location, max_participants, status, publisher_org_id, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{coverFileId}, #{attachmentJson}, #{activityStartTime}, #{activityEndTime}, #{signupStartTime}, #{signupEndTime}, #{location}, #{maxParticipants}, #{status}, #{publisherOrgId}, #{publishTime}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_activity SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, cover_file_id = #{coverFileId}, attachment_json = #{attachmentJson}, activity_start_time = #{activityStartTime}, activity_end_time = #{activityEndTime}, signup_start_time = #{signupStartTime}, signup_end_time = #{signupEndTime}, location = #{location}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_activity SET status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_activity SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM biz_activity a INNER JOIN biz_activity_scope s ON a.id = s.activity_id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
AND ( s.scope_type = 'ALL' OR s.scope_ref_id = #{userOrgId} OR #{ancestorPath} LIKE CONCAT('%/', s.scope_ref_id, '/%') )
